Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Sword Sage]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Unsouled ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 13''' — The Sword Sage's Remnant was sealed in the Grand Patriarch’s tomb.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 13''' — The Sword Sage came from beyond Sacred Valley.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 15''' — The Sword Sage was an Enforcer.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 16''' — The Sword Sage's Remnant is made up entirely of sword-aspect madra.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 16''' — The Sword Sage's Remnant is capable of understanding script and thinking strategically.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 16''' — The Sword Sage always carried rare sacred herbs on his person.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 16''' — The Sword Sage's Remnant uses his sword.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 16''' — Yerin is the disciple of the Sword Sage.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 17''' — The Sword Sage has a body that Lindon wants to find.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 20''' — The Sword Sage's Remnant has six blades on its back.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 20''' — The Sword Sage left a gold badge for Yerin.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 20''' — The Sword Sage was interred in the Ancestor's Tomb.}}

== Soulsmith ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 15''' — The Sword Sage is Yerin's master.}}

== Blackflame ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 7''' — A Sage's Remnant can perform unimaginable feats.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 13''' — The Sword Sage's knot is described as something Yerin's guest was content not to strain against.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 14''' — The Sword Sage plucked Yerin from the ashes of her childhood home.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 18''' — The Sword Sage can cut a mountain in half without a sword.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 18''' — The Sword Sage taught Yerin not to show mercy to enemies and to act without regret.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 19''' — The Sword Sage has a spiritual sense.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 19''' — The Sword Sage has an apprentice.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 19''' — The Sword Sage left behind a Remnant.}}

== Skysworn ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 2''' — Yerin has uncovered four of the Sword Sage's memories since achieving Highgold.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 8''' — The Sword Sage taught that the pursuit of perfection in the sacred arts is a lonely pursuit.}}

== Ghostwater ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 11''' — The Sword Sage has six sword-arms on his back.}}

== Underlord ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 3''' — Yerin asked if the Sword Sage gave her something better.}}

== Uncrowned ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 19''' — The Sword Sage is a wiry man with messy hair and half-lidded eyes.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 19''' — The Sword Sage wields a white sword.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 19''' — The Sword Sage's power level was higher than an Underlord.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 20''' — The Final Sword is an adaptation of the Sword Sage's strike.}}

== Wintersteel ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 8''' — The Sword Sage is a title or rank that Yerin could potentially achieve.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 22''' — Sages do not take apprentices.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 25''' — Quickriver clashed with the Sword Sage’s nameless blade.}}

== Bloodline ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 2''' — The Sword Sage is dead.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 22''' — The room Lindon entered was the Sword Sage’s private storage space.}}

== Reaper ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 2''' — The Sword Sage had a private void space.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 3''' — The Sword Sage is a person who prefers to work alone rather than with a team.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 10''' — The Sword Sage made it out of the labyrinth but was weakened by Jades.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 11''' — Attacks of a certain level would not trouble the Sword Sage even with a suppression field.}}

== Waybound ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 8''' — The Sword Sage is the source of the echo Lindon brought for Yerin.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 12''' — The Sword Sage is a source of information mentioned by Yerin.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
